description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The exterior is predominantly white, featuring large rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The house is accompanied by a spacious, fenced-in green yard with a single tree, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The structure includes multiple visible rooms and a clear separation between the main building and an attached section, possibly a garage or utility area. The main entryway appears understated, with no prominent porch or decorative columns, emphasizing simplicity. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on geometric forms and open outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a fenced green yard with a single tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry area and attached section, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large fenced yard, tree, and multiple windows on the house's facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive green yard, tree, and the back of the house with several windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, window arrangement, and the yard's boundary.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or decorative columns, minimalistic and flush with the facade
